meaning: n.[化]二氢氯化物,二盐酸化物
examples: The resultant hydrolytic reaction product is dihydrochloride .
Methods The nitrite was detected from samples by N-Naphthylethylenediamine Dihydrochloride.
Objective to discuss the effects of Trimetazidine Dihydrochloride and Spironolactone on congestive heart failure.
